subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department shall annually publish in appropriate media and on the department’s Internet website in a format that allows the information to be read into a commercially available electronic database a statistical comparison of department districts and the following information, calculated on a per capita basis considering the most recent census data and listed for each county and for the state for each fiscal year:
the number of square miles;
the number of vehicles registered;
the population;
daily vehicle miles;
the number of centerline miles and lane miles;
construction, maintenance, and contracted routine and preventive maintenance expenditures;
combined construction, maintenance, and contracted routine and preventive maintenance expenditures;
the number of district and division office construction and maintenance employees;
information regarding grant programs, including:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: Routine Airport Maintenance Program grants;

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: Public Transportation Grant Program grants;

subsections.label: C
subsections.text: Medical Transportation Program grants; and

subsections.label: D
subsections.text: aviation grants or aviation capital improvement grants;
approved State Infrastructure Bank loans;
Texas Traffic Safety Program grants and expenditures;
the dollar amount of any pass-through toll agreements;
the percentage of highway construction projects completed on time;
the percentage of highway construction projects that cost:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: more than the contract amount; and

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: less than the contract amount; and
a description of real property acquired by the department through the exercise of eminent domain, including the acreage of the property and the location of the property.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department shall include information from all department contracts in the statistical comparison and information reports required under Subsection (a).

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The department shall annually publish in appropriate media and on the department’s Internet website in a format that allows the information to be read into a commercially available electronic database the following information for each fiscal year:
the amount of money in the Texas Mobility Fund itemized by the source of the money; and
the amount of money received by the department:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: itemized by the source of the money; and

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: compared to the amount of money appropriated by the legislature to the department in the General Appropriations Act.

subsections.label: d
subsections.text: The department shall annually publish in appropriate media and on the department’s Internet website in a format that allows the information to be read into a commercially available electronic database a list of each contract the department has with:
a person required to register as a lobbyist under Chapter 305 (Registration of Lobbyists) , Government Code;
a public relations firm; or
a government consultant.

history.raw: Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 276 (H.B.3514), Sec. 10, eff. September 1, 2021.
